name: Sevagoth, captain of the tempestari, Warframe
description: Sevagoth is a bio-mechanical war machine known as a warframe. His powers are shadow based, doing anything from slowing down enemies with their own shadows to sending his shadow out as a sentient fighter. His body is comprised of white and purple gunsteel, and his internals are made of a bio-mechanical zombie virus that turned him into this called the infestation. He has no memory of his life before being transformed by the evil man known as Ballas. As the captain of the tempestari, he fights to save others from space pirates and other criminals.
creator: UmbraGuass25
